title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.026 - Orientation program for appointees required, purpose
text:
324.026.  Orientation program for appointees required, purpose. — An orientation program for appointees to all boards or commissions in the division of professional registration shall be prepared under the direction of the director of the division, which shall acquaint new appointees with their duties and provide available information on subject matters of concern to the board or commission to which each public member has been appointed.
(L. 2008 S.B. 788)
